updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="24dp" android:height="24dp" android:viewportWidth="24" android:viewportHeight="24"> <path android:fillColor="#2C3E50" android:pathData="M20,11H7.83l5.59,-5.59L12,4l-8,8l8,8l1.41,-1.41L7.83,13H20v-2z" /> </vector>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F4F7F9">
<androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/resultPreviewCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_margin="32dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/filterScroll" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivEditingPhoto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:scaleType="centerInside" /> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<HorizontalScrollView android:id="@+id/filterScroll" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:padding="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/frameScroll">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFilterNone" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="None" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFilterSoft" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="Soft" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFilterBW" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="B/W" /> </LinearLayout> </HorizontalScrollView>
<HorizontalScrollView android:id="@+id/frameScroll" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:padding="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/stickerScroll">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFrameNone" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="Frame None" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFrameCortis" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="Cortis" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFrameT1" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="T1" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFrameAespa" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="Aespa" /> </LinearLayout> </HorizontalScrollView>
<HorizontalScrollView android:id="@+id/stickerScroll" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:padding="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnFinishEdit">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnStickerNone" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="Sticker None" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnStickerStar" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="Star" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnStickerFlash" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="Flash" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnStickerCamera" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="Camera" /> </LinearLayout> </HorizontalScrollView>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnFinishEdit" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:text="CREATE RESULT" app:backgroundTint="#34495E" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F4F7F9">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/topAppBar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@android:color/transparent" app:navigationIconTint="#2C3E50" app:title="@string/title_edit" app:titleCentered="true" app:titleTextColor="#2C3E50" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/resultPreviewCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_margin="32dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/filterScroll" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/topAppBar">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivEditingPhoto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:scaleType="centerInside" /> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<HorizontalScrollView android:id="@+id/filterScroll" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:padding="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/frameScroll">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFilterNone" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="None" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFilterSoft" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="Soft" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFilterBW" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="B/W" /> </LinearLayout> </HorizontalScrollView>
<HorizontalScrollView android:id="@+id/frameScroll" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:padding="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/stickerScroll">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFrameNone" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="Frame None" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFrameCortis" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="Cortis" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFrameT1" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="T1" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFrameAespa" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="Aespa" /> </LinearLayout> </HorizontalScrollView>
<HorizontalScrollView android:id="@+id/stickerScroll" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:padding="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnFinishEdit">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnStickerNone" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="Sticker None" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnStickerStar" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="Star" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnStickerFlash" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="Flash" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnStickerCamera" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:text="Camera" /> </LinearLayout> </HorizontalScrollView>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnFinishEdit" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:text="CREATE RESULT" app:backgroundTint="#34495E" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F4F7F9"> <!-- Màu nền xám xanh rất nhạt, sang trọng -->
<!-- Header Area --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/header" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-medium" android:letterSpacing="0.05" android:text="Memories" android:textColor="#2C3E50" android:textSize="32sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Elegant Capture Experience" android:textColor="#7F8C8D" android:textSize="14sp" android:letterSpacing="0.1" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Khung Camera chính --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/previewCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:layout_marginEnd="24dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintDimensionRatio="1:1" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/header">
<androidx.camera.view.PreviewView android:id="@+id/viewFinder" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#DCDFE2" /> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Nút Start Camera --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/btnStartCamera" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:foreground="?android:attr/selectableItemBackground" app:cardBackgroundColor="#34495E" app:cardCornerRadius="4dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/previewCard"/>
<!-- Nút chọn tỉ lệ --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/ratioContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" app:singleSelection="true" app:checkedButton="@+id/btnRatioSquare" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnStartCamera">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRatioSquare" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="1:1" android:textColor="#2C3E50" app:strokeColor="#BDC3C7" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRatioWide" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="16:9" android:textColor="#2C3E50" app:strokeColor="#BDC3C7" />
</com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup>
<!-- Nút Lưu ảnh (Chụp ảnh) --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnCapture" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginHorizontal="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="40dp" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-black" android:letterSpacing="0.15" android:text="Take Photo" android:textSize="14sp" app:backgroundTint="#75A7DB" app:cornerRadius="0dp" app:elevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutResult" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F0F7FF" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:visibility="gone" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Select your best shot" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="#5D8AA8" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp"/>
<!-- Lưới hiển thị ảnh vừa chụp --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvPhotos" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnNextToEdit" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="60dp" android:text="Next to Edit" app:cornerRadius="30dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp"/> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F4F7F9"> <!-- Màu nền xám xanh rất nhạt, sang trọng -->
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/topAppBar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@android:color/transparent" app:navigationIconTint="#2C3E50" app:title="@string/title_camera" app:titleCentered="true" app:titleTextColor="#2C3E50" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Header Area --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/header" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/topAppBar">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-medium" android:letterSpacing="0.05" android:text="Memories" android:textColor="#2C3E50" android:textSize="32sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Elegant Capture Experience" android:textColor="#7F8C8D" android:textSize="14sp" android:letterSpacing="0.1" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Khung Camera chính --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/previewCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:layout_marginEnd="24dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintDimensionRatio="1:1" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/header">
<androidx.camera.view.PreviewView android:id="@+id/viewFinder" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#DCDFE2" /> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Nút Start Camera --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/btnStartCamera" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:foreground="?android:attr/selectableItemBackground" app:cardBackgroundColor="#34495E" app:cardCornerRadius="4dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/previewCard"/>
<!-- Nút chọn tỉ lệ --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/ratioContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" app:singleSelection="true" app:checkedButton="@+id/btnRatioSquare" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnStartCamera">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRatioSquare" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="1:1" android:textColor="#2C3E50" app:strokeColor="#BDC3C7" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRatioWide" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="16:9" android:textColor="#2C3E50" app:strokeColor="#BDC3C7" />
</com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup>
<!-- Nút Lưu ảnh (Chụp ảnh) --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnCapture" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginHorizontal="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="40dp" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-black" android:letterSpacing="0.15" android:text="Take Photo" android:textSize="14sp" app:backgroundTint="#75A7DB" app:cornerRadius="0dp" app:elevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutResult" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F0F7FF" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:visibility="gone" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Select your best shot" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="#5D8AA8" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp"/>
<!-- Lưới hiển thị ảnh vừa chụp --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvPhotos" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnNextToEdit" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="60dp" android:text="Next to Edit" app:cornerRadius="30dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp"/> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F4F7F9" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSelectTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-medium" android:text="Select your best shots" android:textColor="#2C3E50" android:textSize="24sp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvPhotos" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnNextToEdit" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvSelectTitle" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnNextToEdit" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:text="CONTINUE TO EDIT" app:backgroundTint="#34495E" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F4F7F9" android:padding="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/topAppBar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@android:color/transparent" app:navigationIconTint="#2C3E50" app:title="@string/title_selection" app:titleCentered="true" app:titleTextColor="#2C3E50" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvPhotos" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnNextToEdit" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/topAppBar" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnNextToEdit" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:text="CONTINUE TO EDIT" app:backgroundTint="#34495E" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F4F7F9" android:padding="24dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvResultTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-medium" android:text="Your Masterpiece" android:textColor="#2C3E50" android:textSize="28sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/finalImageCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginVertical="24dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnSavePng" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvResultTitle">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivFinalResult" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:scaleType="centerInside" /> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSavePng" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:text="SAVE AS PNG" app:backgroundTint="#34495E" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnSaveVideo" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSaveVideo" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:text="SAVE AS VIDEO" app:backgroundTint="#7F8C8D" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnHome" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnHome" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="BACK TO HOME" android:textColor="#34495E" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F4F7F9" android:padding="24dp">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/topAppBar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@android:color/transparent" app:navigationIconTint="#2C3E50" app:title="@string/title_result" app:titleCentered="true" app:titleTextColor="#2C3E50" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/finalImageCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginVertical="24dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnSavePng" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/topAppBar">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivFinalResult" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:scaleType="centerInside" /> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSavePng" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:text="SAVE AS PNG" app:backgroundTint="#34495E" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnSaveVideo" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSaveVideo" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:text="SAVE AS VIDEO" app:backgroundTint="#7F8C8D" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnHome" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnHome" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="BACK TO HOME" android:textColor="#34495E" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F0F7FF"> <!-- Màu nền xanh cực nhạt -->
<!-- Header Title --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvHeader" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="50dp" android:text="Customize your session" android:textColor="#5D8AA8" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Section 1: Quantity Selection --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardQuantity" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="24dp" android:layout_marginTop="30dp" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@android:color/white" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvHeader">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="How many photos? " android:textColor="#85929E" android:textSize="16sp" android:layout_marginBottom="15dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/toggleGroupQuantity" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:singleSelection="true" app:selectionRequired="true" app:checkedButton="@+id/btn4">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn1" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="1" app:cornerRadius="12dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn2" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="2" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn4" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="4" app:cornerRadius="12dp" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup> </LinearLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Section 2: Frame Selection Placeholder (KHOẢNG TRỐNG CHO FRAME) --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardFrames" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginHorizontal="24dp" android:layout_marginVertical="20dp" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@android:color/white" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@+id/btnNext" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/cardQuantity">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Choose your Frame ✨" android:textColor="#85929E" android:textSize="16sp" />
<!-- Chừa trống để bạn thêm Frame sau này --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:alpha="0.3" android:text="(Frames coming soon...)" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Nút CONTINUE TO CAMERA --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnNext" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="70dp" android:layout_marginHorizontal="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="30dp" android:text="CONTINUE TO CAMERA ➜" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#85C1E9" app:cornerRadius="35dp" app:elevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F0F7FF"> <!-- Màu nền xanh cực nhạt -->
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/topAppBar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@android:color/transparent" app:navigationIconTint="#2C3E50" app:title="@string/title_setup" app:titleCentered="true" app:titleTextColor="#2C3E50" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Section 1: Quantity Selection --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardQuantity" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="24dp" android:layout_marginTop="30dp" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@android:color/white" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/topAppBar">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="How many photos? " android:textColor="#85929E" android:textSize="16sp" android:layout_marginBottom="15dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/toggleGroupQuantity" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:singleSelection="true" app:selectionRequired="true" app:checkedButton="@+id/btn4">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn1" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="1" app:cornerRadius="12dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn2" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="2" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn4" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="4" app:cornerRadius="12dp" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup> </LinearLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Section 2: Frame Selection Placeholder (KHOẢNG TRỐNG CHO FRAME) --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardFrames" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginHorizontal="24dp" android:layout_marginVertical="20dp" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@android:color/white" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@+id/btnNext" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/cardQuantity">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Choose your Frame ✨" android:textColor="#85929E" android:textSize="16sp" />
<!-- Chừa trống để bạn thêm Frame sau này --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:alpha="0.3" android:text="(Frames coming soon...)" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Nút CONTINUE TO CAMERA --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnNext" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="70dp" android:layout_marginHorizontal="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="30dp" android:text="CONTINUE TO CAMERA ➜" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#85C1E9" app:cornerRadius="35dp" app:elevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">ExpressionPhotoBooth</string> <string name="author">Trọng Đức</string> <string name="capture_photo">Capture</string> <string name="ratio_square">1:1</string> <string name="ratio_wide">16:9</string> <string name="camera_not_ready">Camera is not ready yet</string> <string name="failed_create_folder">Cannot create photo folder</string> <string name="capture_failed">Capture failed</string> <string name="camera_permission_granted">Camera permission granted</string> <string name="camera_permission_denied">Camera permission denied</string> <string name="photo_saved_path">Saved: %1$s</string> <string name="no_photo_to_continue">No photos captured</string> <string name="no_photo_to_edit">No photo selected for editing</string> <string name="failed_open_photo">Cannot open selected photo</string> <string name="failed_save_temp_result">Cannot create edited preview</string> <string name="no_result_to_show">No result image to display</string> <string name="no_result_to_save">No result image to save</string> <string name="failed_save_result">Failed to save image</string> <string name="saved_to_gallery">Saved to gallery: %1$s</string> <string name="no_images_for_video">No captured images to create video</string> <string name="exporting_video">Exporting timelapse video...</string> <string name="failed_save_video">Failed to export video</string> <string name="video_saved_to_gallery">Video saved to gallery: %1$s</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">ExpressionPhotoBooth</string> <string name="author">Trọng Đức</string> <string name="capture_photo">Capture</string> <string name="ratio_square">1:1</string> <string name="ratio_wide">16:9</string> <string name="camera_not_ready">Camera is not ready yet</string> <string name="failed_create_folder">Cannot create photo folder</string> <string name="capture_failed">Capture failed</string> <string name="camera_permission_granted">Camera permission granted</string> <string name="camera_permission_denied">Camera permission denied</string> <string name="photo_saved_path">Saved: %1$s</string> <string name="no_photo_to_continue">No photos captured</string> <string name="no_photo_to_edit">No photo selected for editing</string> <string name="failed_open_photo">Cannot open selected photo</string> <string name="failed_save_temp_result">Cannot create edited preview</string> <string name="no_result_to_show">No result image to display</string> <string name="no_result_to_save">No result image to save</string> <string name="failed_save_result">Failed to save image</string> <string name="saved_to_gallery">Saved to gallery: %1$s</string> <string name="no_images_for_video">No captured images to create video</string> <string name="exporting_video">Exporting timelapse video...</string> <string name="failed_save_video">Failed to export video</string> <string name="video_saved_to_gallery">Video saved to gallery: %1$s</string> <string name="back">Back</string> <string name="title_setup">Customize Session</string> <string name="title_camera">Camera</string> <string name="title_selection">Choose Best Shot</string> <string name="title_edit">Edit Photo</string> <string name="title_result">Result</string> </resources>
